highlights.text: Seoul (2N) → Gyeongju (1N) → Busan (1N) → Jeju (2N) luxury circuit
VIP Hanbok Gyeongbokgung & Han River sunset yacht
Bulguksa Temple, Gamcheon Village & Busan catamaran
Jeju volcanic wonders & Haenyeo diver experience
Tour code TRAGUIN-K luxury-003 | Serial KR-003

itinerary.title: South Korea Luxury Tour
itinerary.overview: An extraordinary exploration curated by TRAGUIN — where hyper-modern skylines blend with ancient dynastic traditions. Premium FIT itinerary connecting Seoul, Gyeongju, Busan, and Jeju Island with private executive MPV, five-star accommodations, and TRAGUIN curated experiences.
itinerary.seo_title: KR-003 | South Korea Luxury Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Luxury 06 Nights / 07 Days South Korea package (KR-003): Seoul, Gyeongju, Busan, Jeju Island, KTX first class, Han River yacht, and Busan catamaran cruise.

days.title: Seoul — Grand Arrival & Ultra-Luxury Welcome
days.description: VIP airport concierge at jet bridge with fast-track immigration. Luxury sedan along Han River. Evening drive to Namsan Seoul Tower for panoramic city views. Welcome dinner at Michelin-starred Gaon.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Incheon VIP fast-track, Namsan Tower view
Evening Experience: Welcome dinner at Michelin-starred Gaon
Overnight Stay: Seoul (Signiel Seoul — Ultra Luxury)
Meals Included: Welcome Drink & Dinner

days.title: Seoul — Dynastic Majesty & Immersive K-Culture
days.description: Private early-access Gyeongbokgung Palace walk in custom Hanboks. Bukchon Hanok Village and Insadong. Private K-Pop dance masterclass or Samsung Innovation Museum. Premium tea blending ceremony.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Gyeongbokgung Palace, Bukchon Hanok Village, Insadong
Evening Experience: Han River luxury sunset yacht cruise
Overnight Stay: Seoul (Signiel Seoul — Ultra Luxury)
Meals Included: Breakfast

days.title: Gyeongju — The Ancient Kingdom of Shilla
days.description: First-class KTX bullet train to Gyeongju. UNESCO Bulguksa Temple and Seokguram Grotto. Daereungwon Tomb Complex. Evening illumination of Donggung Palace and Wolji Pond.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Bulguksa Temple, Daereungwon, Wolji Pond illumination
Evening Experience: Starlight walk by Cheomseongdae Observatory
Overnight Stay: Gyeongju (Lahan Select — Premium Lake View)
Meals Included: Breakfast

days.title: Busan — Maritime Grandeur & Coastal Sophistication
days.description: Haedong Yonggungsa Temple on ocean cliffs. Gamcheon Culture Village. Haeundae Blueline Park sky capsules. Private luxury catamaran from Suyeongman Marina under Gwangan Diamond Bridge.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Haedong Yonggungsa, Gamcheon Culture Village, Haeundae Blueline Park
Evening Experience: Private catamaran yacht cruise with fireworks
Overnight Stay: Busan (Park Hyatt Busan — Ocean View Suite)
Meals Included: Breakfast

days.title: Jeju Island — Volcanic Wonders & Pristine Nature
days.description: Premium flight to Jeju. Seongsan Ilchulbong sunrise peak. Manjanggul lava tunnel. Exclusive Haenyeo female diver experience with freshly caught seafood on shore.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Seongsan Ilchulbong, Manjanggul cave, Haenyeo experience
Evening Experience: Traditional black pork BBQ fine dining
Overnight Stay: Jeju Island (The Shilla Jeju — Luxury Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast

days.title: Jeju Island — Tea Plantations & Majestic Waterfalls
days.description: Osulloc Tea Museum and green tea fields with private tea-stone class. Cheonjiyeon Waterfall and Jusangjeolli Cliff hexagonal rock formations. TRAGUIN premium family farewell dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Osulloc Tea Museum, Cheonjiyeon Falls, Jusangjeolli Cliff
Evening Experience: Exclusive multi-course royal court farewell dinner
Overnight Stay: Jeju Island (The Shilla Jeju — Luxury Resort)
Meals Included: Breakfast

days.title: Departure — End of a Luxury Odyssey
days.description: Leisurely breakfast at luxury resort. Private chauffeur to Jeju International Airport for domestic flight to Seoul Incheon connecting with international departure.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private departure transfer to Jeju airport
Meals Included: Breakfast

inclusions.text: 06 Nights in ultra-luxury handpicked hotels across Seoul, Gyeongju, Busan, and Jeju
Dedicated private executive MPV (Kia Carnival or similar) throughout
KTX high-speed train first-class tickets (Seoul to Gyeongju)
Han River sunset yacht and Busan catamaran cruises
Professional English-speaking elite guides for all sightseeing
Custom VIP arrival kit and traditional welcome gifts
K-ETA or South Korea entry visa processing
Personal expenses, laundry, mini-bar, and unspecified meals
